serverInfo.name: mcp-registry-mcp
serverInfo.description: MCP server for managing MCP server registries — health checks, duplicate detection, and configuration portability
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: register_server
tools.description: Register an MCP server with metadata, URL, and transport type

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Check server health — connection test, latency measurement, uptime tracking

tools.name: find_duplicates
tools.description: Find servers with overlapping tool definitions using Jaccard similarity

tools.name: export_config
tools.description: Export portable config for Claude Desktop, Cursor, or VS Code

tools.name: get_inventory
tools.description: List all registered servers with health and usage stats

tools.name: recommend_consolidation
tools.description: Suggest merging duplicate or overlapping servers

tools.name: check_before_install
tools.description: Pre-install health, security, and token cost report for a server

resources.description: All registered servers with current health status
